videos.headline: Diego Pavia on Commodores' comeback: 'We're never out of the fight'
videos.description: Quarterback Diego Pavia says Vanderbilt's stunning turnaound that led to a 44-20 win at Virginia Tech was simply a matter of cleaning up some first-half mistakes.
